error.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
error.MEDIA_SERVICE_ERROR: The media generation service encountered a problem. Please try again later.

error.GENERATION_FAILED: Video generation failed. Please try again.
